smart.desc: Computer-controlled card sorting system with AI visual inspection. Up to 25,000 packs per batch with 100% error detection.

ai.title: AI Visual Inspection
ai.desc: Real-time card inspection at 400+ sheets/min. Detects wrong cards, missing cards, and out-of-sequence issues instantly.

smartSystem.title: Computer Card Dispatching System
smartSystem.description: Our intelligent card dispatching system uses a computer, card dispensing machines, and multiple card feeders to automatically sort and package cards according to pre-set recipes.
features: Edit card sorting process in Excel — simple and intuitive
1,000+ process recipe files storable; 25,000 packs per batch
Anti-error detection: white card / thickness / AI visual inspection
Auto alarm & shutdown on errors; quick restart after troubleshooting
Compatible with all 6 packaging line configurations

overview.title: Pioneer in One-Stop Packaging Solutions
overview.intro1: Guangzhou Chanfer Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd (formerly Dongguan Chanfer Intelligent Packing Technology Co., Ltd), founded in 2011, is a National High-Tech Enterprise and Guangdong Province SRDI (Specialized, Refined, Differentiated, Innovative) certified company.
overview.intro2: As a pioneer in providing one-stop count-and-packaging solutions, CHANFER operates two core divisions:

equipment.title: Equipment Manufacturing Division
equipment.desc: With 25 years of technical experience and a spirit of continuous innovation, we actively provide high-value packaging equipment that effectively reduces labor costs in production. Our product value lies in creating higher added value for customers.

contract.title: Contract Packaging Division
contract.desc: 5,000m² cleanroom packaging facility with our own equipment, staff, and packaging film. Clients only need to provide the inner product — we handle everything else. Truly one-stop packaging services that let you take on large orders with confidence.

items.question: What are the 6 packaging methods for game cards?
items.answer: The 6 main packaging methods for game cards are: Candy Packaging (pillow-style flow wrap), Self-Adhesive Strip Packaging (reclosable strip bag), Four-Sides Sealed Packaging (sealed on all edges), Banding Packaging (paper band bundling), Heat Shrink Packaging (shrink film wrapping), and Three-Dimensional Packaging (3D box-style wrap).

items.question: What is the production speed of card packaging machines?
items.answer: Production speeds vary by packaging method: Candy Packaging 20-220 bags/min, Self-Adhesive Strip 30-90 packs/min, Four-Sides Sealed 50-150 packs/min, Banding 5-20 packs/min, Heat Shrink 20-100 bags/min, and Three-Dimensional 40-80 bags/min.

items.question: Does CHANFER provide complete packaging production lines?
items.answer: Yes, CHANFER provides complete turnkey packaging lines including automatic card feeding, counting, packaging, cartoning, case packing, sealing, and robotic palletizing. We also offer a computer card dispatching system for intelligent card sorting.

items.question: What industries does CHANFER serve?
items.answer: CHANFER primarily serves the game card, board game, trading card, and paper printing industries. We also provide packaging solutions for food, medical, daily chemical, and hardware sectors.
